funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT)
benefits: Seed funding up to INR 20 lakhs for proof of concept
Up to INR 50 lakhs for prototype development
Up to INR 50 lakhs for market entry and commercialization

eligibility.summary: DPIIT-recognized startup, incorporated not more than 2 years ago, with a business idea for product/service with market fit and commercialization scope. Must apply through eligible incubators.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Software Technology Parks of India (STPI), MeitY
benefits: Seed funding up to INR 25 lakhs

eligibility.summary: Tech startups in IT/ITeS/ESDM sectors. Open to registered companies and individual innovators. Must work in emerging technology domains. Annual turnover less than INR 100 crore.

geography.city: Agartala, Bhilai, Bhopal, Bhubaneswar, Dehradun, Guwahati, Jaipur, Lucknow, Prayagraj, Mohali, Patna, Vijayawada

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Software Technology Parks of India (STPI), SGPGI Lucknow, UP Govt

eligibility.summary: Private Limited Company, Registered Partnership Firm, or LLP. Incorporation not beyond 10 years. Annual turnover not exceeding INR 100 crore. Must work in MediElectronics or Health Informatics.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Kerala Startup Mission (KSUM), Government of Kerala

eligibility.summary: Startups registered with KSUM or Kerala-based innovators. Technology-driven ideas with scalability and market orientation.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Department of Science & Technology (DST), Government of India
benefits: Prototype grant up to INR 20 lakhs (PRAYAS Centre)
Prototype grant up to INR 40 lakhs (Advanced PRAYAS Centre)

eligibility.summary: Individual innovators (Indian citizens, 18+) or early-stage startups. Must demonstrate clear ownership of IP. Deep-tech ideas eligible for Advanced PRAYAS. Physical product development focus.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.program_name: BIRAC SBIRI (Small Business Innovation Research Initiative)
funding_opportunities.organization: Biotechnology Industry Research Assistance Council (BIRAC), DBT

eligibility.summary: Indian companies with 51%+ Indian shareholding, LLPs. Must have in-house R&D facility or be incubated at recognized incubator. Academic collaborators from public/private universities and national labs.
MVP-ready or market-ready startups from the Indian subcontinent. Focus on innovative solutions. Program fee of INR 90,000 + GST.
Early-stage Indian startups looking to raise their first institutional cheque. Must have an incorporated Indian entity. Building from India for Indian/global markets.
MVP-stage startups with traction (early users, initial revenue, or validated demand). Sector-agnostic. No geographic restriction. Founders preparing for first serious investor conversations.
Sector and stage agnostic. Open from napkin stage to revenue stage. Indian founders building for Indian or global markets.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
benefits: Up to INR 1 Cr accelerator funding

eligibility.summary: Early-to-mid-stage startups in healthcare or climate-tech. TRL 4 or higher. Early evidence of real-world impact. Based anywhere in India.
Early-stage startups in POC/MVP to early traction/revenue stage. Sector-agnostic. Open to applications from across India.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Foundation for Innovation and Technology Transfer (FITT), IIT Delhi
benefits: Incubation space at IIT Delhi Research & Innovation Park

eligibility.summary: Technology-driven startups with innovative products/processes (preferably first 5 years). Registered as Pvt Ltd in India. >50% shares held by Indian citizens. At least one full-time promoter.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: iTIC Incubator, IIT Hyderabad & NMDC Limited
benefits: NICE Fellowship: upto INR 9.6L for 12 months
NICE Incubation: upto INR 25L (2 years, ~3% equity)

eligibility.summary: Indian citizen founders with Engineering/Science graduate background. Deep-tech idea. For Incubation: Prototype/MVP stage, tech with possible IP, DPIIT-registered Pvt Ltd company.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Agricultural and Food Engineering Department, IIT Kharagpur & NABARD

eligibility.summary: Startups in agriculture, rural development, and allied domains. Early-stage ventures with innovative solutions for agricultural challenges.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.program_name: IIT Mandi Catalyst Startup Exploration Program
funding_opportunities.organization: IIT Mandi Catalyst, Indian Institute of Technology Mandi
benefits: Grant funding support up to INR 9 Cr

eligibility.summary: Startups and innovators at prototyping or product development stage. Founders looking to move from idea/prototype to market-ready solutions.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.program_name: NSRCEL Impact Orbit - Tech-enabled Social Innovations

eligibility.summary: For-profit and non-profit tech-enabled registered ventures. More than 1 year in operation. Early revenue to growth stage with proven POCs. Impact-first with potential to impact at least 3 SDGs.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
benefits: Grant support up to INR 30 lakhs
NSRCEL Startup Kit (AWS, RazorpayX, Stripe, Zoho credits)

eligibility.summary: DPIIT-registered, revenue-generating startups. Post-MVP and market-ready. Existing customer base. Focus sectors: AgriTech, ClimaTech, FinTech, InclusiveTech, Sustainability, EdTech, Healthcare, Deep Tech.
Organizations with evidence-backed solutions for women's digital inclusion. Focus on locally led innovations in India and Sub-Saharan Africa. Proven high-impact solutions ready to scale.
Early to mid-stage tech startups. Product-based (not services). Registered in India or Indian founders with India operations. Full-time founders with diverse skill sets.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
benefits: Azure credits up to USD 150K (investor network)
Azure credits up to USD 5K (direct signup)

eligibility.summary: Startups associated with Microsoft for Startups Investor Network (referral code required for top tier). Pre-seed to Series A. For lower tier: no investor funding required, direct signup.
